compressed_prompt: Write a resume for a fresh high school graduate who is seeking their first job. Make sure to include at least 12 placeholder represented by square brackets, such as [address], [name].
response:
**[Name]**  
[Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  
[Phone Number]  
[Email Address]  

---

### Objective  
Highly motivated and enthusiastic [High School Name] graduate seeking an entry-level position at [Company Name]. Eager to apply strong work ethic, excellent communication skills, and a positive attitude to contribute to team success.

---

### Education  
**[High School Name]**  
[City, State]  
Graduated: [Month, Year]  

- Relevant Coursework: [List any relevant courses, e.g., Business Basics, Computer Applications, etc.]  
- Activities: [List any clubs or organizations, e.g., Student Council, Debate Club, etc.]  
- Honors: [List any honors or awards, e.g., Honor Roll, Academic Achievement Award, etc.]

---

### Skills  
- **Communication:** Strong verbal and written communication skills.
- **Teamwork:** Proven ability to work effectively in team environments.
- **Computer Literacy:** Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
- **Time Management:** Excellent organizational and time-management skills.
- **Customer Service:** Basic understanding of customer service principles.

---

### Experience  

**[Part-Time Job or Internship]**  
[Company Name], [City, State]  
[Month, Year] – [Month, Year]  

- Assisted in [specific tasks, e.g., data entry, customer service, etc.].
- Supported team efforts to [achieve a specific goal, e.g., increase sales, improve customer satisfaction, etc.].
- Learned to [new skill or responsibility, e.g., use specific software, manage inventory, etc.].

**[Volunteer Work]**  
[Organization Name], [City, State]  
[Month, Year] – [Month, Year]  

- Volunteered for [specific role, e.g., event coordination, tutoring, etc.].
- Contributed to [specific project or initiative, e.g., community clean-up, fundraising event, etc.].
- Developed skills in [specific area, e.g., leadership, public speaking, etc.].

---

### Certifications  
- [List any relevant certifications, e.g., CPR/First Aid Certified, etc.]

---

### References  
Available upon request.
